title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.151 - Acts of managing general agent acts of insurer
text:
375.151.  Acts of managing general agent acts of insurer. — The acts of the managing general agent are considered to be the acts of the insurer on whose behalf it is acting.  A managing general agent may be examined as if it were the insurer.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1739 § 10) 
Effective 7-01-91
